import time
import tracemalloc


def benchmark_serializer(data: list[dict]) -> tuple[float, int]:
    tracemalloc.start()
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(1000):
        result = [serialize(item) for item in data]
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    _, peak = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
    tracemalloc.stop()
    print(f"Serializer: {elapsed:.4f}s, peak: {peak / 1024:.1f}KB")
    return elapsed, peak


def serialize(item: dict) -> str:
    return "|".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in item.items())


def benchmark_parser(payload: str) -> tuple[float, int]:
    tracemalloc.start()
    start = time.perf_counter()
    for _ in range(500):
        parsed = [parse_line(line) for line in payload.splitlines()]
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    _, peak = tracemalloc.get_traced_memory()
    tracemalloc.stop()
    print(f"Parser: {elapsed:.4f}s, peak: {peak / 1024:.1f}KB")
    return elapsed, peak


def parse_line(line: str) -> dict:
    return dict(kv.split("=") for kv in line.split("|"))
